name: Impossible Chicken Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. In the pie plate, layer the cottage cheese and parmesan cheese.
4. Mix the chicken with half of the mozzarella cheese, garlic powder, oregano, basil, and tomato paste. Spoon this mixture over the parmesan cheese.
5. In a blender or bowl, beat the remaining ingredients until smooth. Pour this mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
7. Sprinkle the remaining mozzarella cheese on top.
8. Continue baking for 5-8 minutes longer, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
